calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2018 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Basang Malunov, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Newton J. Lam. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Jessica C. Shafer, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Brian Williams, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Basang Malunov, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on June 24, 2016 and served on July 12, 2016.
Proof of Service of Summons & Complaint was filed on July 19, 2016.
Order granting plaintiff's request for publication of Statement of Damages was filed on October 23, 2017.
Proof of Service of Statement of Damages was filed January 8, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on March 29, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 29, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Brian Williams, and against the Defaulted Defendant Basang Malunov, an individual, as follows:

Damages - $80,351.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $20,671.00.
Costs - $3,447.46.
Punitive Damages - $50,000.00.
Total - $154,469.46.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
